inputs.command:
git add narrative/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
narrative: scaffold narrative/ folder with Kael soul + book registry

Adds projects/magicborn/narrative/ (under the submodule) as the
explicit entry point for book-and-soul context. Contents:

  narrative/
    souls/kael.md        — full soul body (voice, world, duty map)
    narrative.toml       — activeSoul=kael + book order pointing at
                           the existing books/ tree (pre-move)
    in-world/            — placeholder for in-world docs

Not auto-read by coding agents. Opened via `gad narrative enter
magicborn` from the parent monorepo. Books stay at
projects/magicborn/books/ for now; narrative.toml references them
by relative path so consumers are unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | head
